PRISM_MOD_POWER_ATTACK_INTENT_POWER.desc: At the start of your next turn, deal {Amount} damage to all enemies {Repeat} times.
PRISM_MOD_POWER_ATTACK_INTENT_POWER.smar: At the start of your next turn, deal {Amount} damage to all enemies {Repeat} times.
PRISM_MOD_POWER_PULSATE_POWER.title: Pulsate
PRISM_MOD_POWER_PULSATE_POWER.descriptio: At the end of each turn, play {Amount} random card(s).
PRISM_MOD_POWER_PULSATE_POWER.smartDescr: At the end of each turn, play {Amount} random card(s).
PRISM_MOD_POWER_RADIANT_GAMBLE_POWER.des: Whenever you play an Attack, play a random card. Removes itself when this reaches 0.
PRISM_MOD_POWER_RADIANT_GAMBLE_POWER.sma: Whenever you play an Attack, play a random card. Removes itself when this reaches 0.
PRISM_MOD_POWER_DOPAMINE_POWER.title: Dopamine
PRISM_MOD_POWER_DOPAMINE_POWER.descripti: Whenever you play a card, add a random card to your hand. It costs 0 this turn. Then lose {Amount} HP.
PRISM_MOD_POWER_DOPAMINE_POWER.smartDesc: Whenever you play a card, add a random card to your hand. It costs 0 this turn. Then lose {Amount} HP.
PRISM_MOD_POWER_VITAL_SPARK_POWER.title: Vital Spark
PRISM_MOD_POWER_VITAL_SPARK_POWER.descri: Whenever you are attacked, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} next turn.
PRISM_MOD_POWER_VITAL_SPARK_POWER.smartD: Whenever you are attacked, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} next turn.
